evals.prompt: I built a productivity app and want to win Huzzler's Launch Arena this week. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Launch Arena competition strategy: submit Mon-Wed, prepare visuals and founder story, engage with community during voting Wed-Sun, share externally, explains Gold/Silver/Bronze winners get 7-day pin and dofollow backlink

assertions.name: launch_arena
assertions.description: Mentions Launch Arena weekly competition cycle

assertions.name: winner_backlink
assertions.description: Mentions dofollow backlink for winners only (Gold/Silver/Bronze)

evals.prompt: I want to submit my product to Huzzler mainly for the SEO backlink. Is it worth it?
evals.expected_output: Warns that backlinks are NOT automatic — only Launch Arena winners get dofollow backlinks. Notes DR41-47, suggests alternatives with automatic backlinks.

assertions.name: not_automatic
assertions.description: Warns backlink is NOT automatic — only winners get dofollow

assertions.name: alternatives
assertions.description: Suggests alternative directories with automatic dofollow backlinks

assertions.name: realistic_expectations
assertions.description: Sets realistic expectations about winning the competition

evals.prompt: Should I buy Huzzler Black for $79?
evals.expected_output: Evaluates Huzzler Black: lifetime premium visibility, verified badge, no ads, upcoming features. Notes most premium features are coming soon. Buy vs skip recommendation.

assertions.name: current_features
assertions.description: Mentions verified badge and lifetime premium visibility

assertions.name: coming_soon_warning
assertions.description: Warns that key features (alternatives pages, problem directory) are coming soon

assertions.name: recommendation
assertions.description: Provides clear buy vs skip recommendation based on use case
